[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)

- Description: Fix Edgar 500 + add Sophia batch-sale SOP guard (SOHA incident)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/267
  
  Details:
  Root-caused and fixed Edgar 500 error on all signed submissions (email_registration.handle AttributeError in dao_protocol). Deployed fix, triggered GAS webhooks to process 40 SOHA sales events.
  
  Added hard and soft batch-sale safeguards to Sophia's autopilot:
  - lookup_event_docs now returns batch_sales_sop field for SALES EVENT with 4 rules (one per QR, per-unit price, sold by ≠ governor, Item = QR code ID)
  - submit_contribution hard-gate rejects SALES EVENT if Item doesn't match QR code pattern
  
  Wrote SOPHIA_BATCH_SALES_PLAN.md §0 in agentic_ai_context with intent interpretation rules.
  
  Investigated Sophia's SOHA thread: found she created 2 erroneous aggregate submissions (total $680, Sold by Gary Teh) because she misinterpreted governor's batch message.
  
  Commits: dao_protocol e36181e, agentic_ai_context 2614254 + bcd4cca, SOHA batch script in dao_client
